entries.title: SM must commit all in-flight working tree diffs before invoking gate validators
ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Design agents write to main repo paths when researcher artifacts show main-repo working directory
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
Avoid multi-filter git show pipelines — use git show SHA:path or git diff instead
